mapper.select:
SELECT U.user_seq, U.user_id, U.user_nm, U.mobile_no, U.dept_nm, U.tel_no, U.email, U.reg_dt, UT.user_type_seq, UT.user_type, UT.org_code, UT.org_nm, UT.org_type, UT.dept_code, ISNULL(UT.approval_yn, 'Y') AS approval_yn, UT.approval_user_id, UT.approval_user_nm, UT.approval_dt, RM.role_code, S.sys_id, S.sys_nm FROM TB_USER_INFO U LEFT JOIN TB_USER_TYPE_INFO UT ON U.user_id = UT.user_id LEFT JOIN TB_USER_ROLE_MAP RM ON U.user_id = RM.user_id LEFT JOIN TB_SYS_INFO S ON UT.org_code = S.org_code WHERE U.user_id = #{userId}
AND S.sys_id = #{sysId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TB_USER_TYPE_INFO ( user_id, user_type, org_code, org_nm, org_type, dept_code, job_seq, approval_yn, approval_user_id, approval_user_nm, approval_dt, staff_type ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{userType}, #{orgCode}, #{orgNm}, #{orgType}, #{jobCode}, 1, #{approvalYn}, #{regId}, #{regNm}, GETDATE(), 'S' )
mapper.update: UPDATE TB_USER_TYPE_INFO SET approval_yn = #{approvalYn}, approval_user_id = #{approvalUserId}, approval_user_nm = #{approvalUserNm}, approval_dt = GETDATE() WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND org_code = (SELECT TOP 1 org_code FROM TB_SYS_INFO WHERE sys_id = #{sysId})
UPDATE TB_USER_INFO SET user_pwd = #{userPwd} WHERE user_id = #{userId}
mapper.select:
SELECT U.user_id, U.user_nm, U.tel_no, U.email, U.dept_nm FROM TB_USER_INFO U JOIN TB_USER_TYPE_INFO UT ON U.user_id = UT.user_id WHERE UT.user_type IN (#{userType}, '6')
AND UT.org_code = #{orgCode} AND UT.approval_yn = 'Y'
AND U.dept_nm = #{deptNm}
ORDER BY U.user_nm
SELECT DISTINCT dept_code, dept_nm FROM TB_DEPT_INFO WHERE org_code = #{orgCode} ORDER BY dept_nm
